name: obby-voice
description: Quick speech-to-text into a daily Inbox note via Whisper WASM, with mobile command.

scripts.postversion: npm run build && git add main.js && git commit -m "build: v$npm_package_version" || true
scripts.deploy: npm run build && cpy main.js manifest.json styles.css "/var/home/octoshrimpy/Documents/Project Luminari/.obsidian/plugins/obby-voice/" --flat --no-overwrite=false
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run build && npm run deploy
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run build && npm run deploy
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run build && npm run deploy

author: octoshrimpy
